title: EU keeps the pressure on
summary:
Main
Image reference: Tankerrr-2-1 (1).jpg | assets/2026-05-18_eu-keeps-the-pressure-on_img_tankerrr-2-128129_89290ba50318.jpg
Whilst the world's attention remains firmly focused on Iran, the EU's 20th sanctions package has perhaps undeservingly received little attention. Yet, the fact that the EU continues to push ahead with further sanctions amid an unprecedented energy crisis is a clear indication that the EU's stance on Russia remains unchanged. The latest package includes further restrictive measures across energy, shipping, trade, finance and anti-circumvention.
